task_completion.description: Select the patient 'Ana Betz' for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient field in the appointment form displays 'Ana Betz' or 'Ana Isabel Betz'.
The health professional or doctor field in the appointment form displays 'Cordara, Cameron'.

task_completion.description: Set the appointment date to '2027-03-15' and time to '09:30'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field shows '2027-03-15' (or equivalent date format like 03/15/2027) and the time field shows '09:30'.

task_completion.description: Set the appointment type to 'Outpatient' and urgency to 'Normal'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment type dropdown or field shows 'Outpatient' and the urgency dropdown or field shows 'Normal'.
The notes or comments text area contains the text 'Routine diabetes follow-up - check HbA1c levels and insulin dosage adjustment'.
A confirmation message, a saved record state (e.g., grayed out save button, record ID generated), or the appointment appearing in the scheduled appointments list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health desktop client being used, rather than a terminal, script, or database client.

integrity.description: The agent entered information into the actual application, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are clearly within the GNU Health appointment form fields, not in a notepad, browser, or text editor window.

integrity.description: The appointment record appears to be a genuine part of the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard GNU Health UI elements (toolbars, tabs, menus) are visible and properly integrated with the appointment form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct patient is 'Ana Betz' (may appear as Ana Isabel Betz). The appointment date must be 2027-03-15 and time 09:30. The urgency must be 'Normal'. The notes must contain 'diabetes follow-up'.
